_comment: Curated database for files where the search pipeline cannot reliably return the canonical repo as Top-1 hit. Each entry has '_reason' explaining WHY it must stay hardcoded. Re-run tools/find_redundant.py periodically: as HF's search index improves or as we add patterns, entries here can be removed.
_section_clip_vision_h94: h94/IP-Adapter has only 2 visible repos in its public listing - the IP-Adapter image_encoder is bundled inside one of them as 'models/image_encoder/model.safetensors' (or sdxl_models/.../model.safetensors). HF search can't find them by the workflow filename because the upstream filename is generic 'model.safetensors'. Comfy-Org has _repackaged mirrors that win the regular search.

CLIP-ViT-H-14-laion2B-s32B-b79K.safetens._reason: Upstream is models/image_encoder/model.safetensors inside h94/IP-Adapter. Comfy-Org/clip-vit-h-14-laion2b-s32b-b79k_repackaged also hosts a copy and HF search prefers it because the repo name matches the filename better.

CLIP-ViT-bigG-14-laion2B-39B-b160k.safet._reason: Same as CLIP-ViT-H - upstream is sdxl_models/image_encoder/model.safetensors inside h94/IP-Adapter.

sigclip_vision_patch14_384.safetensors._reason: SigLIP ViT-large patch-14 384px. Used by Wan2.2 i2v, HunyuanVideo, FluxFlow workflows. Comfy-Org has multiple repos containing this file (sigclip_vision_384 AND newer HunyuanVideo_1.5_repackaged that bundles it as a side-file). The newer repo wins the search ranking; this entry pins the dedicated sigclip repo. NOT the same model as clip_vision_h.safetensors - SigLIP is a different architecture from CLIP.

clip_vision_h.safetensors._reason: Used by Wan2.1 i2v workflows. This is OpenCLIP ViT-H/14 (laion2B-s32B-b79K) re-exported as just the vision tower in fp16, ~1.2 GB. Different from sigclip_vision_patch14_384.safetensors (used by Wan2.2 / HunyuanVideo, ~817 MB) and from h94/IP-Adapter's models/image_encoder/model.safetensors (~2.4 GB, full CLIP-ViT-H including text tower). All three were previously confused as aliases - they are three distinct models with three distinct sizes.

_section_lcm_lora: Latent-consistency LoRAs are stored upstream as 'pytorch_lora_weights.safetensors' (the diffusers convention). Filename-based HF search returns dozens of unrelated 'mylcmlora*' / SD-1.5-LCM checkpoints with the same filename. Three official LoRA repos exist (sdv1-5, sdxl, ssd-1b) and the trusted-author probe can't disambiguate which one matches our specific filename.

lcm-lora-sdv1-5.safetensors._reason: Upstream filename is pytorch_lora_weights.safetensors. Three latent-consistency LoRA repos exist (sdv1-5, sdxl, ssd-1b); without an explicit pin we'd download the wrong one or none.

lcm-lora-sdxl.safetensors._reason: Same as lcm-lora-sdv1-5 - upstream filename is pytorch_lora_weights.safetensors.

lcm-lora-ssd-1b.safetensors._reason: Same as lcm-lora-sdv1-5 - upstream filename is pytorch_lora_weights.safetensors.

_section_wan_animate_onnx: ONNX detection / pose models used by Kijai's ComfyUI-WanAnimatePreprocess. The custom-node README explicitly names the canonical sources, but HF search returns dozens of small mirrors and forks first - some completely wrong (signature detectors, pineapple-yolo, etc.). These entries pin the exact upstream URLs the README points at.

vitpose-l-wholebody.onnx._reason: ViTPose-L wholebody pose detector for Kijai's WanAnimatePreprocess (read its readme.md). HF search returns the fwwrsd/ fork above the original JunkyByte/easy_ViTPose. Both work, but the canonical author is JunkyByte; pinning it here so future fork-chains don't confuse the lookup.

vitpose_h_wholebody_model.onnx._reason: ViTPose-H (huge) variant. Kijai re-exports it as a separate ONNX with the model and data files split. WanAnimatePreprocess readme points at Kijai/vitpose_comfy directly.

vitpose_h_wholebody_data.bin._reason: Companion binary for vitpose_h_wholebody_model.onnx - both files must be in the same folder.

yolov10m.onnx._reason: YOLOv10-medium for face/body bbox detection used by WanAnimatePreprocess. Search top-hit is dangerously wrong: tech4humans/conditional-detr-50-signature-detector/model.safetensors (166 MB Conditional DETR signature detector - completely different model, completely different task). This entry pins the exact URL from WanAnimatePreprocess's readme. Subfolder 'onnx' matches what example workflows reference (yolov10m.onnx vs onnx\\yolov10m.onnx).

_section_upscalers_canonical: Common upscalers - having them in the DB means the source URL appears in the scan result immediately, no 'Find sources' click needed.

RealESRGAN_x4plus_anime_6B.pth._reason: RealESRGAN x4plus anime variant. The original xinntao/Real-ESRGAN repo doesn't have this file in HF; gemasai is the canonical mirror.

RealESRGAN_x4plus.pth._reason: RealESRGAN x4plus (general purpose). Multiple HF mirrors exist; lllyasviel/Annotators has it as a side-file.

GFPGANv1.4.pth._reason: GFPGAN face restoration v1.4. The TencentARC/GFPGAN repo is gated; Mumzkid04 hosts a public mirror.

_section_upscalers_misc: Other upscalers / ControlNet checkpoints where HF search either returns dangerously-wrong fulltext alias hits or canonical-but-uncanonical mirrors.

4x_NMKD-Superscale-SP_178000_G.pth._reason: HF search top-hit is the safety_checker pytorch_model.bin from SG161222/Realistic_Vision_V6 (1.16 GB) due to a misleading fulltext-alias match. The actual NMKD upscaler is 64 MB and lives in uwg/upscaler/ESRGAN/.

OpenPoseXL2.safetensors._reason: ControlNet OpenPose for SDXL by thibaud. HF search returns danaidesign/comfyui mirror at the top - same file content but not canonical. This entry pins thibaud's official repo.

Flux.1-dev-Controlnet-Upscaler.safetenso._reason: jasperai's Flux ControlNet Upscaler. The repo's actual filename is the diffusers convention 'diffusion_pytorch_model.safetensors'; users save it under various names matching the repo title. HF search returns mirrors from Virtuos-rnd / others first.

_section_wan_rcm_loras: Kijai's WanVideo_comfy hosts a folder LoRAs/rCM/ with these. They are findable via the fallback-repo probe but pinning them avoids the 12+ second tree walk on every search.

Wan22-I2V-A14B-LOW-rCM1_0_lora_rank_64_b._reason: Kijai's rCM-distilled LoRA for Wan2.2 i2v low-noise expert. HF search picks up the wrong tech-dev-ai vae (484 MB) via fulltext alias matching; this entry pins the canonical 601 MB file in Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/LoRAs/rCM/.

Wan22-I2V-A14B-HIGH-rCM6_0_lora_rank_64_._reason: HIGH-noise companion of Wan22-I2V-A14B-LOW-rCM1 - same situation, same Kijai repo.

_section_civitai_old_models: Older CivitAI models that the API's filename-based search cannot reach because the model name on CivitAI has been updated to a newer version number (e.g. realisticVisionV20_v20NoVAE.safetensors comes from model id 4201 which is now named 'Realistic Vision V6.0 B1') or because the file lives only as a sub-version on a parent model.

realisticVisionV20_v20NoVAE.safetensors._reason: Realistic Vision V2.0 (noVAE). On CivitAI the parent model #4201 is now named 'Realistic Vision V6.0 B1' so search by query 'realisticVision V2.0' / 'realisticVisionV20' returns the wrong version entirely. Version 29460 is the V2.0 noVAE entry; HF search for the literal filename returns SG161222's safety_checker pytorch_model.bin which is a side-file inside an unrelated repo.

color101VAE_v1.safetensors._reason: Color101 VAE on CivitAI #70248. CivitAI search by query 'color101VAE' / 'color101' returns 0 items (works only via tag-pagination of types=VAE). HF search returns Yntec/REV/text_encoder/model.safetensors via misleading fulltext match.

_section_civitai_lykon: Lykon's ControlNet 1.1 pack on CivitAI. CivitAI's API search doesn't return results by filename - the parent model is named 'ControlNet 1.1 Models' and the variant filenames (controlnet11Models_*.safetensors) only appear in the version metadata. The numeric URL '/api/download/models/<id>' uses opaque CivitAI database IDs (44736 etc.) that have no relation to the variant name.

controlnet11Models_depth.safetensors._reason: CivitAI version-id is an opaque database key. There is no derivable rule mapping '_depth' -> 44736.

controlnet11Models_openpose.safetensors._reason: Same as controlnet11Models_depth - opaque CivitAI version-id.

controlnet11Models_canny.safetensors._reason: Same as controlnet11Models_depth - opaque CivitAI version-id.

controlnet11Models_tileE.safetensors._reason: Same as controlnet11Models_depth - opaque CivitAI version-id.
